title: Activity Indicator
description: Show a native loading spinner using the ActivityIndicator component while data is being fetched.
problemStatement:
User feedback! Given a boolean state `isLoading`, conditionally render the native `<ActivityIndicator />` component if true.

**Requirement:** Set the `size` prop to `"large"`.
hints: ActivityIndicator shows the standard loading spinner for the device (iOS spinner on iPhone, Android circle on Android).
expectedOutput: A native loading spinner visible when isLoading is true
